check_content_excerpt:
Verify that OL 9 uses a separate file system/partition for "/tmp" with the following command:

$ mount | grep /tmp 
tmpfs /tmp tmpfs noatime,mode=1777 0 0

If a separate entry for "/tmp" is not in use, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Migrate the "/tmp" path onto a separate file system.
title: OL 9 must use a separate file system for /tmp.
